title: Kacy's Elevators
description: Simple one-block elevators to help you maneuver your multi-level builds with ease.
body:
![Elevators Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kacys_Elevators/BH_NU_HEADER.png)
![Elevators About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kacys_Elevators/BH_NU_BANNER1.png)

**Simple. Craftable. Colorful.**

Users are able to safely travel between two or more elevators by jumping to ascend or sneaking to descend.
Never use stairs again!

![Elevators Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kacys_Elevators/BH_NU_BANNER2.png)

Elevators come in 16 different colors, each with their own crafting recipe and each will work in combination of other colored elevators. Corresponding elevators can be any Y level between each other and still work - you can go from bedrock straight up to the build height limit, as long as at least two blocks of air exists above the elevator.
Kacy's Elevators have a unique aura on top that adds atmosphere and flair to any build!

![Elevators Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b8d90c785ad2db768890ce6b45509b95820cf5.png)

![Elevators Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791205d92f0460d7bd526be06c3f377658f5ecaf.png)

Simply change the dye in the recipe to the color you would like your elevator to be. That's it!

![BisectHosting Promo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kacys_Elevators/BH_NU_PROMO.png)
[https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector](https://www.bisecthosting.com/selector)
